hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic Serving Dallas with Pride

featureSections.title: ASE-Certified Technicians & Modern Diagnostics
featureSections.body: Our team brings decades of combined experience and advanced diagnostic equipment to every job. Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex transmission repair, we treat your vehicle with the care it deserves.
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty, so you drive away with confidence.

featureSections.title: Honest, Affordable Service Without the Upsell

bullets: Competitive pricing on parts and labor
featureSections.cardBody: Book online or call ahead, and we'll have your vehicle ready when promised.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Lovefield Auto Repair provides comprehensive auto care for all makes and models. Our certified technicians use the latest tools and techniques to keep your vehicle safe and reliable.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Expert brake inspections, pad replacements, rotor resurfacing, and more to ensure your safety.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most important safety feature. Our technicians perform thorough inspections to identify worn pads, damaged rotors, or leaking calipers. We use quality parts and precision tools to restore stopping power and extend the life of your braking system.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels using specialized tools.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a clear estimate with options, explaining what's needed and why.

process.title: Service
process.description: Our techs replace worn parts, machine rotors if needed, and test the system thoroughly.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits and vehicle type. We check them during every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft pedal, or vibrations when braking. If you notice any, bring your car in for an inspection.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint issues and restore engine performance.
services.longDescription: Modern engines are complex, but our diagnostic equipment can quickly identify problems from check engine lights to performance issues. We specialize in both minor repairs and major overhauls, using OEM-quality parts and factory procedures.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect to your vehicle's computer to read error codes and live data.

process.title: Physical Inspection
process.description: Our techs perform visual checks, compression tests, and fluid analysis.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We fix the issue and test drive to confirm the problem is resolved.

faqs.question: What does a check engine light mean?
faqs.answer: It can indicate anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: Can you fix engine warning lights quickly?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostic visits take under an hour, and many repairs are completed same-day.

services.title: Oil Change & Routine Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running smoothly with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Regular maintenance is the key to a long vehicle life. Our oil change service includes high-quality oil and filters, plus a complimentary multi-point inspection to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and add the correct grade of fresh oil.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and lights as part of our courtesy check.

process.title: Reset & Record
process.description: We reset your maintenance reminder and provide a detailed report of your vehicle's condition.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern vehicles need one every 5,000–7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask us.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options to suit your vehicle.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heater service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all climate control systems, from refrigerant leaks to blower motor failures. Our technicians are trained to handle both standard and dual-zone systems.
benefits: Elimination of strange odors or noises

process.title: System Check
process.description: We test pressures, temperatures, and inspect components for leaks or damage.

process.title: Diagnose
process.description: Using electronic leak detectors and thermal imaging, we pinpoint the issue.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We replace faulty parts, evacuate the system, and recharge with the correct refrigerant.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We can diagnose and fix it.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced performance.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Repair in Dallas Since 2003
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps our community safe on the road.
story: Lovefield Auto Repair was founded in 2003 by master mechanic John Lovefield, who wanted to create a shop where customers received the same care and attention he'd give his own family. Starting with a small two-bay garage near Love Field, John built a reputation for thorough diagnostics, fair pricing, and friendly service. Over the years, the shop grew as word spread among Dallas drivers who appreciated being treated with respect.

Today, Lovefield Auto Repair is a full-service facility staffed by ASE-certified technicians who share John's commitment to excellence. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training to stay ahead of automotive technology. Whether you drive a sedan, SUV, or truck, you can count on us to get you back on the road safely and affordably.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend repairs you don't need. Our estimates are detailed and transparent.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only quality parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business that supports Dallas families and neighborhoods.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand by our work with warranties and promise to have your vehicle ready when we say.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Lovefield Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
